title: Payments pending after risk-rules deployment
symptoms: Payments submitted after the morning release stay pending and validation workers crash while selecting a sanctions rule.
logs:
2026-07-17T09:01:13Z INFO transaction-validation-service validation-812 Evaluating risk rules payment_id=PAY-90021
2026-07-17T09:01:13Z ERROR transaction-validation-service validation-812 java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException: Index: 2 Size: 2 while selecting sanctions rule for payment_id=PAY-90021

title: Validated transfers cannot be posted because database pool is exhausted
symptoms: Validated payments fail to post and the ledger outbox backlog grows after database connection acquisition errors.
logs:
2026-07-17T09:01:15Z INFO ledger-posting-service ledger-441 Posting double-entry transaction payment_id=PAY-90021
2026-07-17T09:01:15Z ERROR ledger-posting-service ledger-441 DatabaseConnectionPoolExhaustedException: connection pool exhausted: active=2, max=2 payment_id=PAY-90021

title: Customer balance does not show recent transfer
symptoms: A customer sees an old available balance after a completed transfer and account read latency is elevated.
